summary: Deliverable is incomplete and will not execute. Missing required test files (./tests/*.Tests.ps1 per Invoke-Pester) and fixture files (./fixtures/*.json) that workflow and test harness reference. Workflow jobs will fail: Pester step has no tests to run; generate-matrix step has no fixtures. Test harness run-act-tests.ps1 is not integrated into workflow, so required act-result.txt won't be created. Core logic is well-structured (proper Set-StrictMode, error handling, function naming), but test harness is tightly coupled to output format (regex block parsing) with no schema validation. TDD methodology not demonstrated—no failing tests shown first. To be shippable: must add 5 fixture JSON files, Pester test suite, and integrate harness into workflow or CI runner.
